title: 用 SDK 开启 SSE streaming

body.goal: 让 Claude 的回答逐字到达，而不是等整条消息生成完毕。适用于聊天 UI、长回答、实时展示等场景。
steps: Python SDK：用 client.messages.stream() 上下文管理器，在 with 块里遍历 stream.text_stream 即可逐段拿到文本。
TypeScript SDK：调用 client.messages.stream()，用 on('text', callback) 监听文本增量，或 for await 遍历。
原始 HTTP：在 POST /v1/messages 请求体里设 "stream": true，响应为 SSE 格式（Content-Type: text/event-stream），每个 event 以 data: JSON 行到达。
不需要逐字处理？SDK 也提供 stream=True 后调 .get_final_message()，底层走 streaming 但最终返回完整 Message 对象——避免大 max_tokens 时的 HTTP 超时。

body_en.goal: Get Claude's response token-by-token instead of waiting for the full message. Essential for chat UIs, long responses, and real-time display.
steps: Python SDK: use client.messages.stream() as a context manager, then iterate over stream.text_stream to get text chunks incrementally.
TypeScript SDK: call client.messages.stream(), listen with on('text', callback) or use for await to iterate over chunks.
Raw HTTP: set "stream": true in the POST /v1/messages body. The response arrives as SSE (Content-Type: text/event-stream), with each event on a data: JSON line.
Don't need real-time text? SDKs let you call .get_final_message() after streaming — uses streaming under the hood but returns the complete Message object, avoiding HTTP timeouts on large max_tokens.
